quiz.title: Misspelled Words - SSC Selection Post XIII 2025

questions.question: Choose the option that completes the sentence using the correct spelling. The disappearance of my diary bothered me all day.
questions.explanation: Option A: mystereous does not best fit the requirement of the question. Option B: mistereous does not best fit the requirement of the question.
